// 03 — Capabilities

WHAT THIS
PLATFORM DOES

A complete suite of analytical tools built for banking data science workflows.

01
🔮
Churn Prediction Engine
ML-powered models predict which customers are likely to leave, with probability scores and contributing feature importance rankings.
Random Forest XGBoost SHAP Values
02
🎯
Customer Segmentation
Cluster analysis groups customers by behavior, balance, and demographics. Identify your most valuable segments automatically.
K-Means PCA UMAP
03
📊
Exploratory Analytics
Rich interactive charts for distribution analysis, correlation matrices, feature engineering, and multivariate exploration.
Plotly Seaborn Pandas
04
⚠️
Risk Scoring
Credit risk models evaluate customer profiles and flag high-risk accounts using credit score, tenure, and financial behavior signals.
Logistic Reg. ROC-AUC Calibration
05
🌐
Geo Intelligence
Geographic distribution maps reveal regional performance gaps, concentration risks, and market penetration opportunities.
Choropleth Geopandas Folium
06
📤
Report Generation
Export full analytical reports as interactive HTML dashboards or PDF documents, ready for stakeholder presentations.
HTML Export PDF Report Notebooks
